function.name: testCheckedIf
testCheckedElse
testStringForMatching
Factorial

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("A couple of nested sections followed by a failure", "[failing][.]")

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "toString on const wchar_t const pointer returns the string contents", "[toString]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "toString on const wchar_t pointer returns the string contents", "[toString]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "toString on wchar_t const pointer returns the string contents", "[toString]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "toString on wchar_t returns the string contents", "[toString]" )
